title: NSC Portfolio
description: A personal portfolio website built with React and Vite to showcase research, projects, and experience. Features dynamic JSON-driven content, media embeddings, and a responsive dark-theme design.
highlights: JSON-driven dynamic content — swap data without touching components
Video and photo media per item
Responsive dark-theme design
Resume download and social links

title: F1Tenth — Model Predictive Control (MPC) Agent
description: A Model Predictive Control (MPC) controller for the F1Tenth autonomous racing platform. The agent linearizes and discretizes vehicle kinematics and solves a convex QP at each timestep using CVXPY/OSQP to track a reference trajectory.
highlights: Kinematic bicycle model with state space [x, y, θ, v]
Forward Euler discretization and first-order Taylor linearization
Objective minimizes trajectory deviation, input effort, and input rate of change
Tested in F1Tenth simulation and on physical car in Levine hallway

title: F1Tenth — Vision Lab (Intel D435i Camera)
description: Computer vision pipeline for the F1Tenth autonomous racing car using an Intel RealSense D435i camera. Implements camera calibration, distance measurement, lane detection, and object detection with TensorRT on Jetson NX.
highlights: Camera calibration with OpenCV (chessboard, findChessboardCorners)
Distance measurement using camera intrinsic matrix and mounting height
Lane detection with HSV color space and contour finding
YOLO-based object detection trained in PyTorch, deployed via TensorRT on Jetson NX

title: Fintech App — Spring Boot Backend
description: A Fintech practice project built with Java and Spring Boot, implementing backend services for financial operations and landing engine logic.
highlights: Java Spring Boot REST backend
Landing engine module for financial processing
Practice project for enterprise Java patterns

title: URL Shortener — Node.js & MongoDB
description: A URL shortener service built from scratch to learn URL shortening fundamentals using Node.js and MongoDB Atlas.
highlights: Full-stack Node.js + Express backend
MongoDB Atlas for persistent short-link storage
Short code generation and redirect handling

title: Healthcare Provider App — Scala & Play
description: A healthcare provider web application built with the Scala Play Framework as a practice project for functional backend development.
highlights: Built with Scala Play Framework
Explores functional programming patterns for web backends
Healthcare provider data management

title: MEAN Stack Posts App — Angular
description: A full-stack posts application built with the MEAN stack (MongoDB, Express, Angular, Node.js) under the mentorship of Maximilian Schwarzmüller.
highlights: Angular frontend with TypeScript
Node.js + Express REST API backend
MongoDB for data persistence
GitHub Pages deployment
